hero.hero_strength:
💥 1. Very High Area Damage

She can deal damage to multiple enemies at once. In teamfights, this is a huge advantage.

🧠 2. Strong Crowd Control

Her abilities allow her to slow or control enemies (depending on skill mechanics). This makes her dangerous against less mobile heroes.

🔄 3. Strong Late Game

The longer the match goes, the stronger she becomes. In late game, one well-placed ultimate can decide the fight.

🎯 4. Excellent Positional Play

If your team plays around protection and control, Navorya can fully shine.
hero.hero_weakness:
Very Fragile (Low Health)

She can easily be eliminated by assassins. One positioning mistake = death.

🕒 2. Cooldown Dependent

If her abilities are on cooldown, she becomes much less effective.

⚡ 3. Requires Proper Positioning

She must stay in the backline and maintain distance.

🚫 4. Weak Early Game

Before completing her core items, her damage is not at its peak. Safe farming is important.

spell.spell_desc:
Long-Range Finisher

Navorya often leaves enemies at low HP after her full combo.
Flame Shot allows you to:

Finish off escaping enemies

Secure kills when your abilities are on cooldown

Eliminate targets safely from a distance

This strengthens her burst + poke mage role.
Knockback (Self-Defense)

Flame Shot has a knockback effect at close range.

This is extremely important because:

Navorya is very fragile

Assassins often target her

She lacks strong escape abilities

If an assassin jumps on you:
➡ Use your control ability
➡ Cast Flame Shot at close range
➡ Knock them back
➡ Retreat toward your tower or team

data.title: Novaria's guide

cooperates.cooperate_desc: If Atlas does a perfect ultimate and your second skill is active, you could do huge damage to the enemy and maybe finish them off with your team.

Carmilla's Ultimate will allow Novaria to inflict significant damage to any enemy hero if he targets the shooter/mage/jungler or even all 3 at the same time, It depends on how the enemy team is grouped.

counters.counter_desc: Unfortunately each hero has a counter, even if it remains dodgeable if you are on the edges of the map, and therefore use the second skill to leave the map and go to safety.

dominants.dominant_desc: If you didn't know, with Novaria's second skill you can increase its stack by pretending you don't want to retrieve the orb which will give even more damage. By sticking to a wall your speed will be increased tenfold after the first use of the second skill.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Ling: Ling is a high-mobility assassin who can dive into the backline to eliminate squishy enemies while Novaria provides support from the rear with her magical abilities. Ling can help distract enemies while Novaria's crowd control and area damage abilities can clear waves or finish off weakened targets.

counters.counter_desc: Novaria can also be effective against other mages, especially burst-type mages. The "Gravitational Pull" skill can prevent them from engaging or escaping, limiting their mobility. Additionally, her ability to manipulate zones can render their burst skills less effective if they're caught in her area of control.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Combo Skills: Novaria's ultimate and other skills should be used in a combo for maximum damage. Make sure to use her first skill (charge and release) to poke and control enemies, and then use her ultimate to finish off low-health targets or disrupt the enemy team.
Positioning is key: Novaria is squishy, so staying in the backline during team fights is critical. Use her long-range abilities to poke and deal damage safely.
Use her crowd control: Don't underestimate her ability to slow enemies and
dominants.dominant_title: Novaria excels as a burst mage with a powerful combination of crowd control and magic damage. Building her with items that increase her magic power and cooldown reduction is essential for maximizing h

emblems.emblem_desc:
1. Mage Emblem Set
The Mage Emblem is the best option for Novaria because it provides a balanced mix of damage, cooldown reduction, and mana regen, all of which suit her playstyle. The talents you should prioritize in the Mage Emblem are as follows:

Tier 1:

Magic Power: Increase Novaria's magic power to enhance the damage of her abilities.
Tier 2:

Cooldown Reduction: Reducing cooldowns is crucial for Novaria, as she relies on her abilities to control and deal damage in team fights. This will

equips.equip_desc:
Core Items for Novaria
Lightning Truncheon
Effect: Adds extra burst damage to Novaria's skills by providing a significant increase in her magic power and a passive effect that deals extra damage based on enemy HP.
Why it's good for Novaria: Lightning Truncheon synergizes well with her skillset, allowing her to deal additional damage to enemies, especially in AoE situations. The bonus magic power also boosts her abilities significantly.
Clock of Destiny
Effect: Provides a high amount of magic pow

hero.hero_overview: Novaria is a mage hero in Mobile Legends, introduced as part of the game's expanding roster. Her abilities focus on manipulating energy and space, making her highly versatile with a blend of area control, damage-dealing, and utility. Here's an overview of Novaria's abilities and playstyle
hero.hero_strength:
High burst damage potential.
Strong crowd control and zoning abilities.
Can deal damage while staying at a safe distance.
Great in team fights, especially with her ultimate.
hero.hero_weakness:
Relatively squishy, making her vulnerable to assassins or burst damage.
Requires good positioning and timing for her abilities to be effective.
Relies heavily on her skillset, which makes her less effective without proper execution.
